## Category
**Cluster:** Cyber Risk / Threat Intelligence
**Note:** Bitsight acquired Cybersixgill (dark web threat intel) in November 2024. Combined platform covers external attack surface + deep/dark web intelligence.

---

## Product Brief
1. Cyber risk management and security ratings platform for enterprise and supply chain risk
2. Cybersixgill dark web intelligence now integrated — real-time threat actor data and leaked credential monitoring
3. Differentiator: broadest dataset for external risk quantification, now with dark web coverage
